zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida von Babenberg於大約1076年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇時，她的父親Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich25歲，母親Ida Markgräfin von Österreich24歲。她於1096年與Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia在奧地利維恩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1115年4月14日享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida von Babenberg于大约1076年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇时，她的父亲Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich25岁，母亲Ida Markgräfin von Österreich24岁。她于1096年与Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia在奥地利維恩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1115年4月14日享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Babenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rabenberg, as for example in Saxony or Lower Saxony.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida von Babenberg was born about 1076, in Holy Roman Empire, her father, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, was 25 and her mother, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, was 24. She married Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia in 1096, in Vienna, Austria. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 14 April 1115, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida von Babenberg est née environ 1076, à Saint-Empire romain, son père, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia en 1096, à Vienne, Autriche. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1115, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida von Babenberg um 1076 in Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich 25 und ihre Mutter Ida Markgräfin von Österreich 24. Sie hat 1096 in Wien, Österreich Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 14. April 1115 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Babenberg è nata il circa 1076 nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, sua padre, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia nel 1096, nel Wien, Austria. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 14 aprile 1115, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida von Babenbergが約1076年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで生まれた時，父Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreichは25歳，母Ida Markgräfin von Österreichは24歳であった。1096年にオーストリアウィンでLitold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moraviaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1115年4月14日に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida von Babenberg(이)가 대략 1076년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida Markgräfin von Österreich(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1096년 오스트리아 빈에서 Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1115년 4월 14일 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Babenberg nasceu aproximadamente 1076, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia em 1096, em Wien, Áustria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1115, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida von Babenberg родилась около 1076 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич, её отцу по имени Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida Markgräfin von Österreich, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Litold aka Luitpold of Znojmo Znojemsky Duke of Znojmo in Moravia в 1096 г. в местности Вена, Австрия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 14 апреля 1115 г. в возрасте 40 лет.
